source_expectation.quality_estimate_target: 8/10 or better intake that needs cleanup, not mesh generation from scratch

refinement_checklist: Run raw asset audit before any cleanup.
Normalize naming and review transform or pivot placement.
Capture a front preview render for review.
Record manual gate if origin or pivot normalization still needs author review.
validation_checklist: Manual gate notes are explicit when no generic pivot helper applies.
manual_gate_notes: Current implementation has no generic auto pivot-normalization helper for every prop shape.
Unity prefab authoring and registry import remain manual after export-ready handoff.
